examples: The constantly shifting Khumbu Icefall is like a bunch of ice cubes continually tumbling down the icy mountain wall.
After a hard winter freeze, however, Dow Spout becomes a slick, crystalline "icefall".
A climber USES a ladder to cross a crevasse at Everest's Khumbu Icefall, not far above base camp.
At the other end of the planet, documentarians recently captured the largest icefall ever recorded on film.
U.S. Forest Service officials say the White Mountains contain many winter hazards, including avalanches, icefall, weather, unpredictable snow conditions and crevasses.
